title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Tanker Report - December 12, 2023
summary:
Main
· Dull VLCC market continues, as supply and demand remain balanced - The month of December has so far brought little news for the VLCC market. Spot rates remain relatively flat while there are little new developments pointing to an imminent change in the status quo. In both important markets, namely the Middle East to China and the Atlantic Basin to China market, rates have so far seen little movement since late October.
